h27163289g6cf7g4df0gbe2bge4be2a0c9637: *You catch a waft of something foul - metallic and sickly-sweet.*
h45b8f3d6g8d94g4919gb820g8b53189cf6ee: Forgive the aroma. Powdered iron-vine - an old hunter's trick. Most monsters will think twice before making a meal of me.
h5901d9b0g5115g4c1fga26dg7b6736193e69: You're a monster hunter? I'm surprised, I thought all Gur were wandering cut-throats.
h3ba2161eg7a50g4983g9dc4gc9e3d716add1: Not just cut-throats! We're thieves, con artists, vagrants - the list goes on.
h44db1894gea5dg47eeg92f3g6a0befed065e: I wish I had half the power you settled folk think my people possess. Alas, I am a simple wanderer, on the hunt.
he8bf291agd01dg4b24gae2bgff3e344bdf05: And what is your prey exactly? Dragon? Cyclops? Kobold?
hc7624208g5ec7g4ab2ga0ddg6a30866ffc09: Nothing so dramatic. I'm hunting for a vampire spawn.
hc9143ac0g0d32g4bceg8caega01d83904e44: I'm on a mission from the head of my tribe. She sent me here to capture the beast.
h317b8b81g3e12g42e9g861egc8b4db7a067e: And return him to Baldur's Gate, no doubt?
h9c53b18egd212g4124g8825g8e14004c5823: ...What do you know of this creature?
hd944eee8g960eg439ag9794g3498d48ad289: It can't be. It's not possible.
h06c41a0bgf4b9g471dg9043g834e45324db3: *You catch a waft of something foul - metallic and sickly-sweet.*
he7a34fa1g3fdag4e32gaaacge9065afbaff9: Forgive the aroma. Powdered iron-vine - an old hunter's trick. Most monsters will think twice before making a meal of me.
haa95c704ge044g495bga26agad176358b209: It'd make me think twice, certainly.
h70d71b38g8db7g49c7g9338g4c54d98fd108: I fear it is needed. I am hunting a wicked evil. A beast that prowls the night.
he2a47786g613eg43beg8817g2583d86e48c7: A vile little creature: a vampire spawn named Astarion.
he4ceb198g69a8g43e6gad11gf3897a593b73: Are you all right, my friend? You look a little pale.
h2838efcbg1d4dg4d15gbc8eg9ebdbab7802b: And when you find him? Will you kill this Astarion?
h20715f6cgfc0bg4870ga628gf6b7cc01c677: As much as I'd like to, no.
he8efab2ag41bcg4470g866dg7a9c995eedba: I'm on a mission from the head of my tribe. She sent me here to capture the beast.
h1ef7b666g605eg417dga615g92ceb90b2e39: I am to return him to Baldur's Gate alive. Or as close to 'alive' as a vampire gets.
h7634c835g1c30g48ccga5cfg7f8fbe1c637e: I've just remembered, I need to be somewhere. But good luck with your hunt.
h5ba9fe27g6a14g4a19g957fgc9f87c4ce502: And good luck to you, my friend. Be safe.
he74d5872gcfb4g4792gb627g6930d876a718: Does the name 'Cazador' mean anything to you?
h89d83ee8g276bg490cgb220g5df1d4402fd3: It does not. Why do you ask?
h0922fb80g2674g4a55gaa58g4f59b3cdc444: He's another... hunter. I thought you might work for him.
h85052757gfeeeg451cg9364g1aa37c909a88: I am a simple man - I go where my tribe asks me. Who asks them to send me here, I cannot say.
h68101a4ag7189g49fbg94edg7437cb6d156a: How do you plan to find him?
h52ad3608g2d1fg4e4ega29bg4df567fccad9: I am hoping the hag of these lands can help me. If I could afford her price.
hd77e7998gb44eg4cc4gbe5fg5040dddcd05e: I've been hunting at night, but not found any trace of my prey.
h83e37eabga9a4g4defg8294g05da59688a44: He cannot hide forever, though. I will catch him and return him to Baldur's Gate.
hb43c8200g9420g483dg8a81gc1d3c98da74e: I had hoped the hag of these lands could help me, but it seems she is no more. For the best, perhaps.
hbc4121e7g0a0eg474bgab61g52b71f621431: I'm feeling a little ill, actually. I should go.
h4751abc3g5eceg4121g8bfegc69fc192fb80: Of course. Be safe on your travels.
hd0c4e56ag2068g46d0g973bg03fefe2230d6: You're in the right place - there's plenty of evil here.
he3753dcbg65e2g4fb5gb3e7g264b38d49294: I seek only one evil: a vampire spawn named Astarion.
hc1926da6g2f9cg471cgbfd7ge09010998fe3: Well, you stink. I'm sure that'll protect you.
h63f709ecgbfd8g446fg8b04gdcd7e8f0e11f: I hope so. Anything that discourages a bite. I'm hunting a vampire, you see.
he3a99a89gd9fag4d38ga062g10f0eafb8732: Well, not a true vampire. A spawn named Astarion.
hda7943d6g254fg4682g9c61gf62dc52dbc0c: Why should I believe anything you say?
h0895350ag8a09g4aaeg84a8g26980e91ff27: Believe or don't. It changes nothing about my mission. I'm hunting a vampire, you see.
h17381b0cga3cbg428ega97dg02f34760e63b: I've met people like you before. You're a Gur, aren't you?
h53c68f17g04a3g4f10gb1cagab9e1c7c9528: Guilty. My people are wanderers - we travel across Faerûn, doing what good we can, where we can.
hda5e8174g2c11g4186g8811g5ffc243b4dc1: Here, I will rid this land of a wicked evil. A beast that prowls the night.
hf64aff2dg37e6g4eedgbc12g3fb0d52bde0c: Funny. I thought your people were all cut throats, not monster hunters.
